allow: Bash(else echo "Supervisor directory not found in parent directory")
Bash(else echo ".env file not found in current directory")

Bash(timeout 10 bash -c 'while ! curl -s http://localhost:5001/health > /dev/null 2>&1; do echo ""Waiting for server...""; sleep 1; done; echo ""Server ready!""; curl -s http://localhost:5001/health | head -5')
